mapper.select: select d.id, d.title, u.real_name as sender, u.avatar, CASE WHEN r.code = 3 THEN 'admin' WHEN r.code = 2 THEN 'teacher' ELSE 'student' END as role, d.content, g.grade_name, COALESCE(d.comment_count, 0) as commentCount, COALESCE(d.like_count, 0) as likeCount, COALESCE(d.view_count, 0) as viewCount, d.visibility, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_like WHERE discussion_id = d.id AND user_id = #{userId} AND reply_id IS NULL) THEN true ELSE false END as liked, d.create_time from t_discussion as d join t_user as u on d.user_id = u.id left join t_grade as g on d.grade_id = g.id left join t_role as r on u.role_id = r.id where d.id = #{id}

select d.id, d.title, u.real_name as sender, u.avatar, CASE WHEN r.code = 3 THEN 'admin' WHEN r.code = 2 THEN 'teacher' ELSE 'student' END as role, COALESCE(d.comment_count, 0) as commentCount, COALESCE(d.like_count, 0) as likeCount, COALESCE(d.view_count, 0) as viewCount, d.visibility, d.content, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_like WHERE discussion_id = d.id AND user_id = #{userId} AND reply_id IS NULL) THEN true ELSE false END as liked, d.create_time from t_discussion as d join t_user as u on d.user_id = u.id left join t_role as r on u.role_id = r.id left join t_grade as g on d.grade_id = g.id
and d.title like concat('%',#{title},'%')
and ( d.visibility = 1 OR (d.visibility = 0 AND d.grade_id = #{gradeId}) )
order by d.create_time desc

select d.id, d.title, u.real_name as sender, u.avatar, CASE WHEN r.code = 3 THEN 'admin' WHEN r.code = 2 THEN 'teacher' ELSE 'student' END as role, COALESCE(d.comment_count, 0) as commentCount, COALESCE(d.like_count, 0) as likeCount, COALESCE(d.view_count, 0) as viewCount, d.visibility, d.content, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_like WHERE discussion_id = d.id AND user_id = #{userId} AND reply_id IS NULL) THEN true ELSE false END as liked, d.create_time from t_discussion as d join t_user as u on d.user_id = u.id left join t_role as r on u.role_id = r.id where d.visibility = 1 OR d.grade_id IN (SELECT grade_id FROM t_user_grade WHERE user_id = #{userId}) order by d.like_count desc, d.create_time desc limit #{size}
